productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Slide Grey Orange Flip Flop
description: Don that carefully careless look with these funky slippers from adidas. While the textured footbed massages your feet whenever you walk, the textile thong straps sit comfortably on the upper of your foot, pampering your feet.UpperSynthetic thong straps with stitch detailing for snug Fit and protection from abrasionSynthetic toe separator to support the footBrand mark on thong straps for styleMidsoleFoam footbed with graphics and brand mark for cushioned all-day comfort and styleFootbed with textured graphics for constant massaging of the footOutsoleTPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for greater grip and stabilityshoe careWipe off dirt with a moist clothDo not machine wash
